title: Seeds of Anxiety: Asterisk
synopsis: In the beginning, this place was filled with someone's memories—sad memories. With the passage of time, those memories break down, and every so often, they creep into our everyday world as…disturbances. Why do they show themselves to us? Perhaps they seek a mouthpiece for their own despair, or something else entirely. When strangeness takes root in a place of woe, the seeds of dread begin to germinate… (Source: Yen Press)

tags.name: Cosmic Horror
tags.description: A type of horror that emphasizes human insignificance in the grand scope of cosmic reality; fearing the unknown and being powerless to fight it.

tags.name: Body Horror
tags.description: Features characters who undergo horrific transformations or disfigurement, often to their own detriment.

tags.name: Anthology
tags.description: A collection of separate works collated into a single release.

title: Tama Torarechattayoooo
titleNative: タマとられちゃったよおおおぉ
synopsis: The grim city of Oosaka is controlled by the Yakuza. On the secluded artificial island of Sakishima, there exists a rumour: There is a "wolf" out hunting the Yakuza. This wolf would use a demon sword to slay the Yakuza's dignity. That is, this sword has the ability to turn them into little girls!!!! A tale of the high-school student who hunts Yakuza and the former-Yakuza girl! These pretend-siblings with a bond too strong will face the Yakuza infesting Oosaka. This is a battle-filled and action-packed story of chivalry featuring big twists and turns!!!

title: Rice Shoulder
synopsis: The story revolves around a 202-pound, 18-year old girl named Okome Akino (whose name is a pun of "autumn rice"). After Okome enters a sumo match and wins against a male amateur fighter by a landslide, a trainer named Akane scouts her, and she enters the world of women's boxing. (Source: Anime News Network)

tags.name: Female Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is female.

tags.name: Seinen
tags.description: Target demographic is adult males.

tags.name: Tomboy
tags.description: Features a girl who exhibits characteristics or behaviors considered in many cultures to be typical of boys.

tags.name: Boxing
tags.description: Centers around the sport of boxing.

title: Koushaku Reijou no Rouraku Mission: Maou to no Seiryaku Kekkon ga, Jinrui Saigo no Kirifuda desu!... tte, Maou ga Onnanoko no Baai wa Dou Sureba Ii no desu ka!?
titleRomaji: Koushaku Reijou no Rouraku Mission: Maou to no Seiryaku Kekkon ga, Jinrui Saigo no Kirifuda desu!... tte, Maou ga Onnanoko no Baai wa Dou Sureba Ii no desu ka!?
titleNative: 公爵令嬢の籠絡ミッション～魔王との政略結婚が、人類最後の切り札です！…って、魔王が女の子の場合はどうすればいいのですか！？～
synonyms: The Duke's Daughter's Mission to Seduce the Demon King, Humanity's Final Gambit: A Political Marriage with the Demon King! ...Hang On, But What am I Supposed to Do If the Demon King is a Girl!?
synopsis: Five demons launched a war against humanity, destroying more than half of its lands. Among them, the Demon King, who has killed more humans than any other, and a duke's daughter enter into a political marriage, bringing the war to a temporary ceasefire. Cecilia, the duke's daughter, sets out to win over and ensnare the Demon King, hoping to prevent the extinction of humanity. However, the Demon King is hiding a major secret...? (Source: Young Champion, translated)

title: Fuuto Tantei
synonyms: ยอดนักสืบแห่งฟูโตะ
synopsis: In the ecologically-minded city of Fuuto, mysterious devices resembling USB flash drives called Gaia Memories are used by criminals and other interested parties to become monsters called Dopants, committing crimes with the police force powerless to stop them. To make matters worse, the Gaia Memories carry a dangerous toxin that cause their users to go insane to the point where they could die from the life-threatening devices. After the death of his boss, the self-proclaimed hard-boiled detective Shoutarou Hidari works with the mysterious Philip to investigate crimes which involve Dopants. Using their own Gaia Memories, Shoutarou and Philip use the Double Driver belts to transform and combine into Kamen Rider Double to fight the Dopant menace and keep Fuuto safe. (Source: Kamen Rider W Wiki) Note: Fuuto Tantei is a manga adaptation and sequel of the 2009 drama TV series Kamen Rider W .
